title: festuca robusta var. scabriuscula
intro: Festuca robusta var. scabriuscula, also known as tall fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions. The medicinal properties of tall fescue include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming tall fescue include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression, and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of tall fescue can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory health and alleviate stress.
